title: Sutra Override Audit Record
description: Schema v1 for entries written to .enforcement/override-audit.jsonl. See OVERRIDE-SCHEMA.md (sibling) for the human-readable spec, lifetime guard, sanitization rules, and migration policy.
$comment: additionalProperties:false applies to PRODUCERS — the shared writer must not emit unknown fields. CONSUMERS (audit aggregators, future readers) MUST tolerate unknown fields per OVERRIDE-SCHEMA.md federation policy. Do not use this schema as a strict read gate.

schema_version.description: Pinned to 1 in this version. Future-incompatible changes bump.

override_kind.description: v1 emits ONLY governance_bypass (codex review fix 2026-04-18). Test-path overrides (TRIAGE_LOG_OVERRIDE, ESTIMATION_LOG_OVERRIDE) do not emit audit records — they are not in this schema's scope. Future hybrids add new enum values without bumping schema_version; consumer readers MUST tolerate unknown enum values per federation policy.

mode.description: Lifetime Guard mode. legacy = env-var-only invocation (audit amplification, F16 partial mitigation). strict = token-gated invocation via *_TOKEN env var validated against single-use file under .claude/override-tokens/ (true F16 mitigation). See OVERRIDE-SCHEMA.md Lifetime Guard section.

alias.description: The historical env-var convention (stable identifier). New governance gates SHOULD register their alias here when added.

gate.description: Stable ID of the gate (e.g. PROTO-004, I-14, D13).

decision.description: Resolved decision after override processing. 'allow' for accepted overrides; 'deny' if override rejected (missing reason, expired, malformed); 'warn' for advisory mismatch flags.

original_gate_severity.description: Exit code the gate would have emitted without override. Separates 'denied-then-overridden' (2) from 'advisory passes' (1).

reason.description: Operator-supplied. Input validation rejects (does not strip) only CR/LF/NUL — these break JSONL line boundaries. Quotes/backslashes/punctuation pass through unchanged; the shared writer JSON-escapes them on serialize per RFC 8259. Codex review fix 2026-04-18 — prior draft was over-destructive.

actor.description: Active role at override time. Derived from .claude/active-role; falls back to 'unknown'.

company.description: Working tree company name, or 'holding'. Aggregator filters by this.

file.description: File path the gate was evaluating, if applicable. Null when gate is not file-scoped.

nonce.description: Per-invocation random hex (12 chars). Uniquely identifies this override event for de-dup + lifetime tracking.

valid_for_seconds.description: TTL for the override marker. Default 60. Helper rejects if (ts + valid_for_seconds) < now.
